title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-control game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_8cf5b241.jpg)

2. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 
![Lairs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_d06a913c.jpg)

3. **Bailiff of Boscoop**
*2026*
Rise to prominence as the founder of a village, as a judge, or as a duck dealer.
![Bailiff of Boscoop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_81f3aa25.png)

4. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_f2d4fd81.png)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_bba7d660.png)

6. **Inkwell**
*2026*
Complete illustrations or claim new manuscript pages as you impress the abbot.
![Inkwell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_71add9b6.png)

7. **Rumble Nation**
*2017*
Warlords lead their clans to dominate Japan through the use of dice and domino logic.
![Rumble Nation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_250ab0ce.jpg)

8. **Aygor: Demons' Hollow**
*2027*
An epic campaign-based tabletop adventure.
![Aygor: Demons' Hollow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_4889b2ce.jpg)

9. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_d4a77b89.png)

10. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_879f9153.jpg)

11. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_caeb0dfc.jpg)

12. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_52d45e22.jpg)

13. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.
![Nemesis: Retaliation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_28b7a58c.jpg)

14. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_381d727c.png)

15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_3dc5fa87.jpg)

16. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_0aa08d78.jpg)

17. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_5e47db55.jpg)

18. **The Elder Scrolls: Betrayal of the Second Era**
*2025*
Upgrade your character and gear up to explore the many regions of Tamriel.
![The Elder Scrolls: Betrayal of the Second Era](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_9da067ce.jpg)

19. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_75841d65.jpg)

20. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_257741b4.jpg)

21. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_1ae996b3.jpg)

22. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_5f6c0010.jpg)

23. **Doggerland**
*2023*
Hunt for resources, migrate to new lands, and make your clan thrive.
![Doggerland](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_14f263d6.jpg)

24. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_ba149a6d.jpg)

25. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_a5414d3b.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_1cb79bf1.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_8321bc3a.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_7ad09825.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e1eb96a3.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_8fcb2087.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_3f6045e5.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*40 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_968b9750.jpg)

8. **Azul**
*101 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_a1958daf.png)

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e0716123.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_65aef345.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_56b730da.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e284386b.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_be0db5db.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e1e0a9bb.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_769128db.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e996ed2a.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*

![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_6b6d4433.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_c339db91.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e4568b8c.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_0a5725aa.jpg)

21. **The White Castle**
*29 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_e745dcb0.jpg)

22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*

Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.

*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_c4438c86.jpg)

25. **Splendor**
*143 months on the list*

![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-29/toplist/bgg_6c0cb0e9.jpg)
